final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing cover image for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) featuring bubble tea, targeting a pink feminine aesthetic with summer refreshment vibes.

Style/medium: lifestyle product photography, soft editorial aesthetic inspired by Korean beauty brand campaigns, pastel-forward visual language
Composition: top-down flat lay or 45-degree angle, centered bubble tea cup as hero, generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: tall clear plastic cup of bubble tea with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on cup surface, sealed with branded lid
Scene/backdrop: clean pastel pink surface or marble texture, scattered summer props (sunglasses, flower petals, ice cubes)
Lighting/mood: bright soft diffused daylight, high-key cheerful atmosphere, summer freshness
Color palette: soft pink as dominant base, creamy beige from milk tea, dark brown pearls as contrast, white highlights
Materials/textures: smooth glossy plastic cup, chewy tapioca pearls visible through liquid, water condensation droplets, soft fabric or paper backdrop
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, muted colors, generic stock photo feel, text watermarks, dark moody lighting
